positive: A delicate, continuous line art illustration of various exotic botanical elements, such as monstera leaves, eucalyptus branches, and small wildflowers. The style should be minimalist, black ink on a white background, highly detailed, elegant, and suitable for stamping or printing. Studio quality, clean lines, vector aesthetic.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, solid colors, messy, photorealistic
